name: Free Flow USA, Inc.
business: The company has ceased its auto parts operations and is currently pursuing scrap metal trading and processing through its subsidiary Motors & Metals, Inc., although no transactions have materialized. It also seeks investment opportunities through its subsidiary Accurate Investments, Inc. Recent revenue was derived from professional services.

exposures.sentence: Motors & Metals, Inc. is active in the scrap metal trading and processing business, but no transaction has materialized as yet.
